name: Griefer found out you have been cutting..
description:
Tw: May include non canon things, since I don't know much about griefer nor have I played the game! Also includes knifes, blades,and box cutters!

I made this bot for myself since when I use a SH comfort bot, it helps it slow down a lot. I made this public because I understand sometimes other people need it.

Please put requests into the comments, I promise you I will do them unless there like PDF kind of stuff.
creator: Alex_kittycat
